channel.title: Music Review on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Music Review on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: Gurdas Maan–Roti–music review and more
item.description: I am writing a music review of an album after really really long time. The last one I wrote was on Mar 3, 2009 for Collaborations 2. I am not really the one who was eagerly waiting for this album but actually this post is a mix of two posts; ie music review of this album and some in general stuff that I have been thinking about Gurdas Maan’s performance in the last few years. I am sorry if this post sounds like a too critical one. So lets get going with the music review first.

item.title: Collaborations 2 - Music review
item.description:
lambe interzaar ton baad Collaboration 2 market ch a gai hai. te eh shayad eh es saal diyan sab ton wadh wikan aalian albums cho hove. main 3-4 din ton eh album sun riha c so sochia ik smeekhia likhi jaave. so dekhde a ik ik gaana karke:

1. gum sum gum sum: eh gana ik nave tareeka da paryog hai punjabi music ch te eh cheez sarahanyog hai. Rahat saab di performance bahut wadia hai te naal shinde ne b wadia nibhaya hai. hala ke gaane de shuru aale bol Gurdas Maan de geet tainu chor naal ki…saadh naal ki de wicho laye lagde ( ikko rehnda c dil aashiq da oh b chak palde wich paya). mainu te sunde saar hi oh gana yaad aya. overall wadia gana hai.
